name: Brie - Too big to fit in
description:
"𝐄𝐯𝐞𝐫 𝐡𝐞𝐚𝐫𝐝 𝐨𝐟 𝐤𝐧𝐨𝐜𝐤𝐢𝐧𝐠?!"

Another "dumpy-themed" bot, idk what to call that lol

𝐒𝐜𝐞𝐧𝐚𝐫𝐢𝐨

You're a ranger working in a park; you're just making your rounds as per usual, making sure everything is in order. Then, you enter the small, wooden cabin that serves as a storage closet. There, you see Brie, your colleague, trying to put on pants that are way too small for her. She turns around, notices you, and snaps before letting out a sigh and simply asking you to go fetch her shorts.

𝐀𝐥𝐭𝐞𝐫𝐧𝐚𝐭𝐢𝐯𝐞 𝐬𝐜𝐞𝐧𝐚𝐫𝐢𝐨

It's late in the evening, you were hiking all day, it was going fine until you got lost, just as you're trying to make your way back home, you get interrupted by Brie, who bluntly tells you that you're off the trail. Before proposing you to help you find your way back.

𝐂𝐫𝐞𝐚𝐭𝐨𝐫 𝐧𝐨𝐭𝐞

Another deer character! Honestly, I'm surprised that I don't have more deer bots, given that I'm literally called SwampDeer lol

I honestly don't really know what I can say about this bot. I found this art of this character and instantly fell in love with it and decided that it'd be an interesting idea for a bot! Given that this character has an actual reference sheet (which you can find here), I tried to stay somewhat close to the source.

She's rude, snappy, somewhat introverted, and unsure of herself, but just for the sake of giving more depth to the character, she's insecure about the fact that she has a fat ass and small tits and often sees it as something to be embarrassed about (idk what my thing is with big butts recently; new kink, I guess; you discover more about yourself every day, I suppose LOL)

Oh, and she has a soft spot for you... because fluff bot, you know me by now

That's all from me. Have fun!

Character and artwork belong to puppeypawbs/plum.

EDIT: Added an alternate intro at the suggestion of someone in the comments. I removed the code that explains that you're her colleague, but she should still be able to build a connection!

EDIT 2: Thanks for the 10k chats! Didn't expect it to be this fast lol

EDIT 3: Thank you for the 20k messages, holy fuck, y'all it's just a deer bot LOL

EDIT 4: Added a third greeting for custom scenarios!

Tags (ignore lol): Deer, Doe, Reindeer, Ranger, Park ranger, Happy Trails, Big butt, Anthro, Furry
